name: UnDuster
short_description: Escape the depths of an intricate spiky dungeon in UnDuster. Master the peculiar abilities of a powerful vacuum to run, jump, suck, and blow your way through precarious and horrifying platforming challenges.
detailed_description:
Gameplay

UnDuster is a tight precision platformer with two versatile movement abilities - a fast 8 directional dash that sucks you wherever you need to go, and a sustained omnidirectional blast that can blow you away from any hazard.

Story

Gertrude Gummers has lived a long fulfilled life, and the light at the end of the tunnel (retirement) draws ever nearer. But the time has come for one last job. The clients for her maid service have always been eccentric, but the grand secluded manor she has arrived at is more ominous than most. Nothing her custom-built Septuple-A battery powered vacuum can’t handle though.

Features

  • Explore and escape the depths of a mysterious dungeon

  • Collect stickers to adorn your 3D vacuum

  • Wavedash (she ain’t got time for sub-optimal routes)

Game Jam

UnDuster was originally made for the BIGMODE Game Jam in 2023 where it placed #8 in Fun and won a Judge's Choice certificate for "Least Dusty Platforming."
